narrative:
West Chester Twp 20 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,161 registered voters, with 49.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.6 percentage points.
